query:
SELECT 
  u.id as corretorId,
  u.name as corretorNome,
  u.foto_url as corretorFoto,
  COUNT(c.id) as contratosFechados,
  COALESCE(SUM(c.valor_venda), 0) as vgvTotal
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN contratos c ON c.corretor_id = u.id
WHERE u.role IN ('corretor', 'gestor', 'admin')
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.foto_url
HAVING COUNT(c.id) > 0
ORDER BY vgvTotal DESC
